ars_n_spells.ritual_desc.spell_transcrip: Inscribes a cross-mod spell onto a blank target item. Drop a filled Ars Nouveau spell parchment, focus, or spellbook (or an Iron's Spellbooks scroll) as the source, and a blank target item within three blocks of the brazier. Right-click the inscribed item to cast the spell; sneak-right-click cycles between multiple inscriptions.
Spell Transcription: drop a source and a blank target item within three blocks of the brazier.
Spell Transcription: already-inscribed item(s) in range (%1$s). Uninscribe first, or remove them before re-running the ritual.
Spell Transcription: no spell source found. Drop a filled Ars Nouveau spell parchment, focus, or spellbook, or an Iron's Spellbooks scroll.
Spell Transcription found %1$s spell-bearing items (%2$s). Place exactly one source and one blank target.
Spell Transcription: no blank target item found. Drop exactly one blank item to receive the inscription.
Spell Transcription found %1$s non-spell items (%2$s). Place exactly one source and one blank target.
Spell Transcription: %1$s already carries an Ars Nouveau spell at root. Use a blank parchment, or uninscribe first.
Spell Transcription: source %1$s could not be re-parsed during inscription. Remove and re-drop the source, then re-run the ritual.
ars_n_spells.ritual_desc.spellbook_bindi: Binds an exported Ars spell carried by a real Iron's Spellbooks scroll onto a real Iron's spell book. Drop exactly one carrier scroll (made with Spell Transcription or /ans export_to_irons_scroll) and exactly one spell book within three blocks of the brazier. The book then carries the Ars spell alongside its native spells; right-click to cast and sneak-right-click to cycle.
ritual.ars_n_spells.spellbook_binding.er: Spellbook Binding: drop a carrier scroll and a spell book within three blocks of the brazier.
Spellbook Binding: no carrier scroll found. Drop an Iron's scroll exported from an Ars spell.
Spellbook Binding found %1$s carrier scrolls (%2$s). Place exactly one carrier scroll and one spell book.
Spellbook Binding: no spell book found. Drop exactly one Iron's spell book to bind onto.
Spellbook Binding found %1$s spell books (%2$s). Place exactly one carrier scroll and one spell book.
Spellbook Binding: unexpected item(s) in range (%1$s). Drop only one carrier scroll and one spell book.
Spellbook Binding: carrier scroll %1$s could not be re-parsed. Remove and re-drop it, then re-run the ritual.
Spellbook Binding: %1$s already carries this Ars spell.
Spellbook Binding: binding Ars spells onto Iron's spell books is disabled in the server config.
Spellbook Binding: %1$s already holds the maximum of %2$s Ars spells.
ritual.ars_n_spells.spellbook_binding.su: Ars spell bound to spell book: %1$s
ars_n_spells.ritual_desc.spell_uninscrip: Strips the cross-cast inscription from a single inscribed item, leaving it bit-identical to a fresh blank target. Drop exactly one inscribed item within three blocks of the brazier; sources or other blank items in range will cause the ritual to refuse rather than risk stripping the wrong stack.
Spell Uninscription: drop the inscribed item to clear within three blocks of the brazier.
Spell Uninscription: spell-bearing item(s) in range (%1$s). This ritual operates only on already-inscribed items — remove the source(s), or use Spell Transcription instead.
Spell Uninscription: blank item(s) in range (%1$s). Drop only the inscribed item; remove anything else.
Spell Uninscription: no inscribed item found. Drop one item carrying a cross-cast inscription.
Spell Uninscription found %1$s inscribed items (%2$s). Place exactly one inscribed item.
